zh.lifeSummary: Agnes de Fréteval是Foucher de Fréteval和Hildeburg Gouët的女兒，於1065年出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑福利迪瓦爾。她於1079年與Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun在法國崔洛易-吉黑結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1110年之後在法國艾-吉洛易a奧度。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes de Fréteval was born in 1065, in Fréteval, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France as the daughter of Foucher de Fréteval and Hildeburg Gouët. She married Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun in 1079, in Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 1110, in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes de Fréteval est née en 1065, à Fréteval, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, fille de Foucher de Fréteval et Hildeburg Gouët. Elle a épousé Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun en 1079, à Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1110, à Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, France.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes de Fréteval wurde 1065 in Fréteval, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich, als Tochter von Foucher de Fréteval und Hildeburg Gouët geboren. Sie hat 1079 in Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1110 in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes de Fréteval è nata il nel 1065 nel Fréteval, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia come figlia di Foucher de Fréteval e Hildeburg Gouët. Lei sposato Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun nel 1079, nel Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1110, nel Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Frétevalは1065年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーフルeテヴァルでFoucher de FrétevalとHildeburg Gouëtの娘として生まれた。1079年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーでHugh IV Viscount of Châteaudunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1110年以後にフランスエウレ-エト-ロイルチaテアウダンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Fréteval(은)는 1065년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 프e테발에서 Foucher de Fréteval(와)과 Hildeburg Gouët의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1079년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처에서 Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1110년 이후 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 cha테오던에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes de Fréteval nasceu em 1065, em Fréteval, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França filha de Foucher de Fréteval e Hildeburg Gouët. Ela casou-se com Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun em 1079, em Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1110, em Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes de Fréteval родилась в 1065 г. в местности фрeтеваль, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция. Её родителей звали Foucher de Fréteval и Hildeburg Gouët. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun в 1079 г. в местности лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1110 г. в местности чaтодун, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes de Fréteval nació en 1065, en Fréteval, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia como hija de Foucher de Fréteval y Hildeburg Gouët. Se casó con Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun en 1079, en Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 1110, en Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Francia.
